message:
fix(supply_chain): bound versions Vec per extension in extension_registry (bd-2dls)

ext.versions.push() was unbounded while all other Vec fields (audit_log,
revocations, admission_receipts) correctly used push_bounded(). An attacker
able to submit version entries could grow the versions Vec without limit,
leading to memory exhaustion. Added MAX_VERSIONS_PER_EXTENSION = 1024
constant and switched to push_bounded() with oldest-first eviction.

Regression test added: versions_bounded_per_extension.
43 extension_registry tests pass, 5175 lib tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
